title: 宝塚記念の後に・鼓動と輝き

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka emerges victorious from the race.
Disappointed by her loss, Air Groove challenges
Silence Suzuka to another race in the future,
where she vows to restore her pride.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka recognizes the passionate drive
within Air Groove, and the two shake hands to
seal the new challenge.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Witnessing Silence Suzuka's performance in the
Takarazuka Kinen inspires both El Condor Pasa
and Grass Wonder to step up their game as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As summer camp approaches, Silence Suzuka
prepares herself for an all-new challenge.
